title: Narrative Snippets
description: Templated narrative for report generation. Multiple variants per band ensure variety across different users with similar scores. A deterministic hash of the input selects the variant, so the same inputs always produce the same report.

executive_summary.description: Snippets keyed by overall score band (e.g. '1-2', '2-3', '3-4', '4-5'). At least 3 variants per band.

dimension_summaries.description: Per-dimension, per-level narrative. Top-level keys are dimension IDs; values are objects keyed by maturity level ('1'–'5').

additionalProperties.description: Keys are string maturity levels '1' through '5'.

context_observations.description: Score + context combination snippets (e.g. small org with low governance score).
